Overrides.Override: Recover 10% of Skill Mana Cost per unspent Chain when Projectiles end, up to 50% Limited to 1 Runegraft of Recompense
5% chance to Hinder Enemies on Hit with Spells
Buffs on you expire 30% slower Debuffs on you expire 30% faster Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Warp
15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery
10% reduced Attributes 40% increased Global Defences Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Fortress
+1 to Level of all non-Exceptional Support Gems Limited to 1 Runegraft of Gemcraft

Items.Item: Rarity: RARE Oblivion Glisten Large Cluster Jewel Unique ID: 412d47326a450475349eac5585ea1c6e2a797f935fba346ae583c9ffa6d28cda Item Level: 81 LevelReq: 54 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Adds 8 Passive Skills {crafted}2 Added Passive Skills are Jewel Sockets {crafted}Added Small Passive Skills grant: Minions deal 10% increased Damage Added Small Passive Skills also grant: Regenerate 0.1% of Life per Second 1 Added Passive Skill is Primordial Bond 1 Added Passive Skill is Renewal 1 Added Passive Skill is Rotten Claws

Rarity: UNIQUE Incandescent Heart Saintly Chainmail Armour: 1722 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.351 Energy Shield: 412 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.3557 Unique ID: 78df4f33511724718534c57ec3a94e97edc0e262bcff898c1cf75a4a493f49e3 Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-B-B-B-R-R LevelReq: 70 Implicits: 2 +2 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems +2 to Level of Socketed Minion Gems 240% increased Armour and Energy Shield +80 to maximum Life 0.99% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life Gain 11% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage 25% of Elemental Damage from Hits taken as Chaos Damage 21% increased Light Radius Light Radius is based on Energy Shield instead of Life Corrupted
